top_signals.title: Indonesia’s radical export plan takes effect as doubts swirl
top_signals.summary: Indonesia is facing severe investor pressure as questions have grown around governance and its economic outlook under President Prabowo Subianto.

top_signals.title: BWEK Expands Use of GIT Coatings After 6% Out-of-Dock Fuel Savings
